title: AI Copilot
subtitle: Ask questions in natural language — the Copilot answers with your real data.

capabilities.title: What the Copilot can do
capabilities.analyzeDesc: Best month, dominant sources, seasonality — explained in one sentence.
capabilities.anomalyDesc: Royalty gaps, stream drops, late payments.
capabilities.auditDesc: Quantify a gap and pre-draft the verification letter.
capabilities.forecastDesc: 6-12 month trends based on your current growth.

chat.placeholder: Ask a question about your data…
chat.disclaimer: Demo — answers are generated from your demo data.
chat.generic: Good question. In this demo I mostly answer the suggestions below — in production, I query all of your data (streams, revenue, contracts, rights) in natural language and cite my sources.

greeting.artist: Hi {name} — I have analyzed your last 24 months of data. Ask me anything about your streams, revenue or rights.
greeting.label: Hi — I am looking at the consolidated data of the {count} artists on {label}. Ask me your management questions.

suggestions.topSource: Which source earns me the most?
suggestions.topArtist: Which artist is the most profitable?

answers.bestMonth: Your best month is {month}: {amount} in revenue across all sources, {pct} above your monthly average ({avg}). The peak is mostly driven by streaming and live.
answers.growth: Over the last 30 days, your streams are moving {delta} versus the previous 30 days, with {streams} total streams. Your monthly listener base stands at {listeners} — the underlying trend is still carried by your {growthRate} monthly growth.
answers.topSource: Your top revenue source over 12 months is {source}: {amount}, which is {pct} of your total ({total}). That is a healthy concentration level — keep an eye on diversification.
answers.audit: Yes, probably. My reconciliation detects {count, plural, =0 {no gap} one {# gap} other {# gaps}} between expected and reported, totaling {amount}. Head to the Audit module to generate the verification letters.
answers.bestMonthLabel: The roster best month is {month}: {amount} in consolidated revenue, {pct} above the monthly average ({avg}).
answers.growthLabel: Over 30 days, the roster totals {streams} streams, moving {delta} versus the previous period. The momentum is driven by your developing artists.
answers.topArtist: {artist} is your most profitable artist: {net} in net result over 12 months, at a {margin} margin. Revenue generated: {revenue}.
answers.auditLabel: Yes. Across the roster I detect {count, plural, =0 {no gap} one {# gap} other {# gaps}} for a recoverable total of {amount}, spread over {artists, plural, one {# artist} other {# artists}}. The Audit module holds the pre-drafted letters.
